landing_faq_q1: What is LeGoodAnfitrión and what is it for?
landing_faq_a1: Great question! LeGoodAnfitrión is a web platform for people who love hosting — it organizes every detail of an event in one place. It lets you manage guests with detailed profiles (allergies, preferences, intolerances), send invitations with automatic RSVP via a simple link, split expenses among attendees, and generate complete event plans with artificial intelligence. Available in 5 languages: Spanish, English, Catalan, French, and Italian.
landing_faq_q2: Can I use LeGoodAnfitrión from mobile and desktop?
landing_faq_a2: Absolutely! The app is mobile-first, so you can manage your event from your phone anytime. The dashboard adapts beautifully to tablets and desktop too. No app install needed — it works right from your browser.
landing_faq_q3: Can I import guests from my contacts?
landing_faq_a3: Super easy! You can add guests one by one or import full lists from your device contacts, CSV/VCF files, and Google Contacts. Each imported guest gets a profile where you can record dietary preferences, allergies, intolerances, and personal tastes — so the AI takes it all into account when planning.
landing_faq_q4: How are guest preferences and allergies used?
landing_faq_a4: This is where the magic happens! Each guest profile stores information about allergies, intolerances, diet, music tastes, and conversation topics. When you generate the event plan with AI, the system automatically analyzes all this data from the confirmed group to suggest an adapted menu, an adjusted shopping list, ambience, and even personalized icebreakers.
landing_faq_a5: Yes, 100%. We take this very seriously. We apply data minimization principles, explicit consent, and controlled access. Your guests' personal data (allergies, preferences, contact info) is stored securely and only accessible by you as the person hosting. We use Cookiebot for cookie consent management and everything is encrypted with HTTPS.
landing_faq_q6: Is it free? How much does LeGoodAnfitrión cost?
landing_faq_a6: Great news — LeGoodAnfitrión is currently in beta and completely free! The beta plan includes unlimited events, smart guest profiles, public RSVP links with tracking, and hosting suggestions based on group preferences. Paid plans with advanced features will come in the future, but beta members will keep exclusive perks.
landing_faq_q7: How does the expense splitting with Bizum work?
landing_faq_a7: It is really straightforward! From the event dashboard, enter the total expense and the number of confirmed attendees. LeGoodAnfitrión automatically calculates how much each person owes and creates a ready-to-send WhatsApp message with your Bizum number or alias included. Just copy and share — no extra apps or calculators needed.
landing_faq_q8: What are the AI icebreaker games?
landing_faq_a8: Think of it as your party lifeline! Icebreaker Mode instantly generates a bad joke to break the ice, conversation topics tailored to the group's interests, and a quick 5-minute game. You can regenerate it as many times as you want to keep the vibe going.
landing_faq_q9: How does the AI generate the full event plan?
landing_faq_a9: Here's the big picture! The AI Planner analyzes the context of all confirmed guests — their allergies, intolerances, dietary preferences, tastes, and RSVP comments — along with your preferences (style, budget, priorities). With all that information, it generates a comprehensive plan including menu suggestions, shopping list, ambience, event timeline, guest messages, and risk alerts (critical allergies, unconfirmed guests, capacity).
landing_faq_q10: How many guests and events can I manage?
landing_faq_a10: No limits during the beta! Create as many events as you need and add as many guests as you like. Every guest has a complete profile with tabs for identity, food, lifestyle, conversation, and health. Past event history is preserved so the AI keeps learning and improving its suggestions over time.
landing_faq_q11: What languages is LeGoodAnfitrión available in?
landing_faq_a11: Right now, the platform is available in 5 languages: Spanish, English, Catalan, French, and Italian. The language is automatically detected from your browser, but you can change it at any time. The RSVP invitations your guests receive also adapt to the configured language.

privacy_content:
Last updated: March 2026

At LeGoodAnfitrión, we respect your privacy and that of your guests. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information (in compliance with GDPR).

1. Information we collect
- Account data: When you sign up, we collect your email and name.
- Event data: Titles, dates, locations, and guest lists you add to the platform.
- Guest data: Names, RSVP responses, dietary restrictions, and allergies provided by the guests themselves.

2. How we use your information
We use this data exclusively to provide you with the event management service: sending invitations, collecting responses, and generating statistics for your dashboard.

3. Sharing information
We will never sell your personal data or your guests' data to third parties. We only share information with essential service providers (such as hosting or email delivery services) that meet strict security standards.

4. Your rights
You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. If you wish to delete your account and all data associated with your events, please contact us at hello@legoodanfitrion.com.

5. Cookies
We use essential cookies to keep you logged in and analytical cookies (if accepted) to improve our platform. You can manage your preferences at any time.
terms_content:
Last updated: March 2026

Welcome to LeGoodAnfitrión! By using our platform, you agree to these terms and conditions.

1. Use of Service
LeGoodAnfitrión is a tool to help organize events and manage guest lists. You agree not to use the service to send spam, offensive content, or for any illegal purpose.

2. Accounts and Security
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and all activities that occur under it. We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate our policies.

3. Guest Privacy
As an organizer, you are responsible for ensuring that you have your guests' consent to add their data to the platform. LeGoodAnfitrión acts solely as a data processor for this information.

4. Service Availability
We work hard to ensure the platform is always available, but we cannot guarantee 100% uptime. We may perform maintenance or updates that temporarily interrupt the service.

5. Intellectual Property
All code, design, and content of the platform is the property of LeGoodAnfitrión. You are not allowed to copy, modify, or distribute our intellectual property without explicit permission.

6. Limitation of Liability
LeGoodAnfitrión shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use our service.

If you have any questions about these terms, please contact us at hello@legoodanfitrion.com.
landing_footer_copyright: Created with ❤ by: Albert L.G. © 2026 All rights reserved.
about_seo_description: Discover the story behind LeGoodAnfitrión: a web app built for hosts and guests who want to turn their events into truly memorable experiences.
about_hero_title: Celebrate better, care more and stop winging it
about_hero_subtitle: LeGoodAnfitrión is a web app for hosts and guests who want to turn get-togethers, dinners and celebrations into truly memorable experiences.
about_story_p1: The idea for LeGoodAnfitrión had been bouncing around for years. The domain was bought, the logo designed, and there were many conversations with developer friends about the concept. The friction was real: every time I organized a dinner or celebration at home, I ended up chasing confirmations on WhatsApp, forgetting allergies and asking the same questions over and over.
about_story_p2: What was missing was the actual ability to build it. The arrival of AI tools changed everything: it finally gave me the momentum and the practical capacity to create the product I had been imagining for years.
about_story_p3: LeGoodAnfitrión is being built during many long nights, with passion, persistence and plenty of coffee. It comes from a simple conviction: technology can help us take better care of the people we invite — without getting in the way.
about_problem_intro: Organizing a great event should be exciting, not a tangle of messages, scattered confirmations and forgotten details.
about_pain_1: Chasing RSVPs on WhatsApp one by one
about_pain_2: Repeating the same allergy and preference questions every time
about_pain_3: Forgetting who is coeliac, who is vegan, who is lactose-intolerant
about_pain_4: Organizing events with information scattered across notes, chats and spreadsheets
about_pain_5: Improvising too much and losing sight of the details
about_pain_6: Making guests feel they have to explain who they are every single time
about_solution_intro: A platform that centralizes everything you need to be a great host — and to make your guests feel cared for from the very first moment.
about_feature_1: Centralizes guests with rich profiles: preferences, diets, allergies, contact info
about_feature_2: Sends personalized invitations with one-click RSVP (WhatsApp, email, image)
about_feature_3: Collects responses and dietary needs automatically
about_feature_4: AI plans menu, shopping, ambience and timings adapted to your guests
about_feature_5: The Global Guest Profile means nobody has to repeat their allergies ever again
about_mission: Sharing and celebrating are the pillars of everything we build. We want every host to be able to give their guests the love, care and attention that every good celebration deserves.
about_principle_2: Useful information shouldn't have to be repeated
about_principle_3: A good host listens before serving
about_principle_4: Details turn a gathering into a memory
about_principle_5: Technology should help without getting in the way
about_timeline_1: The idea starts brewing: home dinners, forgotten allergies, lost confirmations on WhatsApp
about_timeline_2: The domain is bought and the LeGoodAnfitrión brand is designed
about_timeline_3: Conversations with developer friends: the concept takes shape, but technical capacity is lacking
about_timeline_4: AI unlocks development: it's finally possible to build it independently
about_timeline_5: Beta launch: events, guests, RSVP and AI-powered planning
about_timeline_6: First real event planned: Albert and Laura's 20th wedding anniversary celebration
about_photo_10_alt: Albert and Laura celebrating 10 years of marriage
about_photo_10_caption: 10 years married — the start of a tradition of celebrating well
about_photo_20_alt: Albert and Laura, 20 years together — Fly me to the Moon
about_photo_20_caption: 20 years together — and the next event we're planning with LGA
about_albert_bio: Product manager and creator of LeGoodAnfitrión. Passionate about hospitality, product design and making technology serve to take better care of people.
about_laura_bio: The best cook I know (and I'm not just saying that because she's my wife). She brings the real-world vision of what it means to host well: from the kitchen to the last detail on the table. This year we celebrate 20 years of marriage, and we're planning the event with LGA.
about_not_text: LeGoodAnfitrión doesn't want to be yet another cold event management app. It's not just an RSVP tool, nor just a calendar, nor just a checklist. It's a way to take better care of the people you invite. If you enjoy hosting well, this tool was made for you.
about_status_text: We're building carefully and we want to get it right before getting big. If you're a regular host who wants to take your events to the next level, we'd love for you to try us out.
about_privacy_note: We take the information you share very seriously. LGA was born to reduce friction, not to create more noise or exposure for your data. Your information and your guests' information is protected.
about_cta_quote: If you enjoy hosting well, celebrating better and caring about the details, then LeGoodAnfitrión is probably for you too.
about_signature_laura: With the complicity of Laura, my wife, my partner and the best cook I know.
